title: Administrator can log in and reach the admin dashboard
description: Verifies that a user can sign in with valid credentials and is redirected into the protected admin dashboard area.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Admin can access protected dashboard after login
description: Logs in as an administrator and expects to land on the admin dashboard with KPI content visible.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify dashboard KPI content is displayed

title: Session continuity while navigating between leads and properties
description: After logging in, navigates between leads and properties pages and expects to remain authenticated without re-login prompts.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the leads page
Click the navigation link to open the properties page
Verify the properties inventory list is displayed
Verify the user is not prompted to log in again

title: Update an existing user role/permissions and see it reflected in the list
description: Verifies an administrator can edit a user, change role/permissions, save, and see the updated role/permissions reflected in the users list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open user management
Start editing a user from the list
Change the user role or permissions to a different valid option
Verify the users list shows the user with the updated role or permissions

title: Operator can create a published property with CEP address autofill and images
description: Verifies that a user can create a new property with CEP-based address autofill, attach multiple images, publish it, and see it listed in inventory.

steps.description: Click the properties section in the admin navigation
Fill Property A into the property title field
Fill a valid price into the price field
Fill a valid CEP into the CEP field to trigger address lookup
Toggle the published status to enabled
Verify the new property appears in the property inventory list
Verify the property is shown as published in the inventory list

title: Create a new contract with metadata and a supported document
description: Creates a new contract by entering required metadata, uploading a supported document, and expects the contract to appear in the contracts list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the contracts page
Fill valid values into the required contract metadata fields
Upload a supported contract document file
Verify the contracts list includes the newly created contract record
Verify the new contract shows an attached document indicator

title: Property creation enforces required fields
description: Verifies that attempting to save a new property with required fields empty shows validation errors and prevents creation.

steps.description: Click the properties section in the admin navigation
Attempt to save the property without filling required fields
Verify required field validation errors are visible

title: Update an application setting and receive a success confirmation
description: Verifies an administrator can change a setting value, save, and see a confirmation that settings were updated.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open application settings
Change a setting value to a different valid value
Verify a success confirmation is visible indicating settings were updated

title: Update lead status and see it reflected back in the list
description: Updates a lead’s status in the detail view and expects the lead to show the updated status when returning to the list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the leads page
Open a lead from the list
Change the lead status to a different valid status
Verify the lead appears in the list with the updated status
Verify the lead list reflects the status change without requiring a page reload

title: Filter leads by status and open a lead detail view
description: Filters the lead list by a status and expects the list to update and a lead detail view to open successfully.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the leads page
Select a status in the lead status filter
Open a lead from the filtered list
Verify the lead detail view is displayed
Verify the lead status control reflects the selected status filter context

title: Dashboard KPIs and charts update when date range or filters change
description: Verifies that KPI tiles and a dashboard chart respond to a changed date range or filter selection.

steps.description: Adjust the dashboard date range or filter to a different valid option
Verify the KPI summary is displayed
Verify a dashboard chart updates to reflect the selected range or filter

title: Create a new client and see it listed in the directory
description: Creates a client with contact and company details and expects the client to appear in the directory list after saving.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the clients page
Fill "Test Client Axis" into the client name field
Fill valid values into the remaining required client fields
Verify the client directory list includes "Test Client Axis"

title: Apply multiple lead filters and see filtered results
description: Applies multiple filters on the leads page and expects the results list to update to match the selected criteria.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the leads page
Apply an additional available lead filter
Verify the lead list updates to show only filtered results
Verify active filter indicators are displayed

title: View contracts list
description: Opens the contracts page and expects the contracts list to render and be usable for browsing existing records.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the contracts page
Verify a list of contracts or an empty state is displayed
Verify controls to start a new contract are available

title: Show required-field validation when creating a new user with empty fields
description: Verifies the user creation form blocks saving when required fields are empty and displays validation errors.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open user management
Attempt to save the new user without filling required fields
Verify required-field validation errors are displayed and the user is not created

title: Dashboard chart provides metric detail on inspection
description: Verifies that inspecting a chart segment provides a tooltip or detail view for the selected metric.

steps.description: Inspect a dashboard chart segment to reveal metric detail
Verify a tooltip or detail view for the selected metric is visible

title: Search or filter clients and see refined results
description: Uses the client search or filter controls and expects the directory list to update to only matching clients.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the clients page
Fill "Test Client" into the client search field
Verify the client list updates to show search-matching results
Verify the list does not show clearly non-matching clients

title: Block saving when an application setting value is invalid
description: Verifies the settings form shows inline validation errors for an invalid value and prevents persisting the change.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open application settings
Fill an invalid value into a setting field that enforces validation
Verify a validation error is displayed and the invalid setting is not saved

title: Prevent contract save when an unsupported file type is selected
description: Attempts to upload an unsupported contract file type and expects an inline validation error and saving to be blocked.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the contracts page
Upload an unsupported document file type
Verify a file type validation error is visible
Verify the contract cannot be saved

title: Login form blocks invalid email format
description: Verifies that entering an invalid email format prevents login submission and shows an email validation error.

steps.description: Fill invalid-email into the email field
Fill any-password into the password field
Verify an email validation error is visible
